resources.string: You have joined the enterprise, please contact the administrator to assign rights.
Ak chcete zabezpečiť svoj účet, čo najskôr potvrďte svoju e-mailovú adresu
Ak máte akékoľvek otázky, môžete nás kontaktovať
Email address already existing, you can log in with your account password.
E-mail s odkazom na obnovenie hesla vám bol odoslaný. Skontrolujte svoj e-mail a kliknite na prepojenie na úpravu hesla.
E-mail s aktivačným odkazom vám bol odoslaný. Skontrolujte svoj e-mail a kliknutím na odkaz aktivujte svoj účet.
redemption record in last two years

"1: Other redemption codes are provided by third-party partners. Regarding the details of the event, the third party has the final right of interpretation. 2: Please read the redemption rules carefully, claim and complete the redemption as soon as possible in case the event expired."
Abnormal claim, please contact customer service! Error code %s
Sign in / register for free trial
Väzba zlyhala, účet tretej strany bol použitý!
Väzba zlyhala, účet bol viazaný predtým!
Neinštalovali sme WeChat klient alebo WeChat verzia je zastaraná
Pre dnešný deň ste prekročili maximálny počet pokusov. Skúste to znova zajtra.
Prekročili ste maximálny počet pokusov o túto adresu IP, zmeňte inú adresu IP alebo skúste znova zajtra.
Príliš častá prevádzka, skúste to znova neskôr.
Heslo by malo obsahovať aspoň dva typy čísel, písmen a symbolov.
Heslo by malo obsahovať 6-21 znakov, rozlišujúcich veľké a malé písmená.
Please read and check to agree to the relevant agreement:
Please check the box to agree after reading it.
After clicking Redeem, the prize rights will be directly distributed to your current account. Do you want to redeem immediately?
Problémy s předplatným? Dej nám vědět
Privacy Policy and User Agreement have been read and agreed.
Please read and agree to the Privacy Policy and User Agreement.
Prihláste sa s účtom tretej strany
The renewal service of DWG FastView for this order will expire at %s, and will no longer be automatically renewed after expiration
Operation failed, please contact customer service
Users registered through one-click login and mobile phone verification code, as well as new unregistered users, can use mobile phone number verification to complete the binding.
Unregistered new users will be automatically registered after successful verification.
Overovací kód je nesprávny. Zadajte znova!
Platnosť verifikačného kódu vypršala. Opýtajte sa znova!
Kód vyúčtovania sa nezhoduje s úrovňou účtu.
"Redeem code status is wrong, can't redeem"
Redeem upper limit exceeded in this activity!
You are not the owner of the business and cannot place an order
The number of indicators needs to be greater than or equal to the number of indicators in the current company account
A new purchase by a company cannot be treated as a repurchase, please check the company data
You are not the owner of the business, you cannot redeem the redemption code
The number of exchange indicators does not match the number of current corporate indicators
1. V prípade platených účtov by mal kód výplaty zodpovedať úrovni účtu.
2. Aktivujte ho v rámci platného obdobia, inak bude neplatné.
3. Kódy nebudú oprávnené na vrátenie alebo výmenu, ak budú ukradnuté, uniknuté alebo stratené.
4. Všetky práva vyhradené spoločnosti Gstarsoft Co., Ltd.
There is a problem with your subscription. Click here to go to the Google Play subscription settings to fix your payment method.
Unregistered mobile phone numbers will be automatically registered after successful verification.
S cieľom overiť totožnosť vášho účtu sme poslali verifikačný kód na adresu
Nasledujúce informácie budú úplne odstránené a po zrušení vášho účtu ich nebude možné získať.

DWG FastView (mobile version, Windows version and web version) are unified account system. If you cancel this account, the above and other Gstarsoft will not be able to use this account. And the data and information stored in it will be permanently deleted and cannot be retrieved.
All privileges and services you purchased and obtained with the above account and other Gstarsoft accounts are considered as automatically abandoned.
boli prečítané a dohodnuté Zmluva o zrušení používateľského účtu

Ak sa chcete v budúcnosti vyhnúť akejkoľvek finančnej strate, uistite sa, že ste zrušili automatické obnovenie na ukončenie predplatného a že na vašom účte DWG FastView nie sú k dispozícii žiadne prostriedky. Zrušenie účtu vymaže všetky informácie a údaje. Naozaj chcete zrušiť svoj účet
Účet nemôžete zrušiť bez prečítania a súhlasu so Zmluvou o zrušení používateľského účtu
Platená funkcia. Účet je potrebné inovovať.
Vyhľadávanie a nahrádzanie textu je platená funkcia. Upravte účet
Platená funkcia. Prihlásenie / Registrácia na skúšku zadarmo
Vyhľadávanie a nahrádzanie textu je platená funkcia. Prihlásenie / Registrácia na skúšku zadarmo

"Users who purchase the product of \"Premium Account for 12 Months\" can go to the WeChat official account of \"Haochen DWG FastView\" to apply for an invoice. 1: Search and follow \"Haochen DWG FastView\" on WeChat Official Accounts. 2: On the official account homepage, enter \"issue invoice\" and click to send a message. 3: According to the prompt of the system reply, complete the invoice issuance application."
Nelze vytvořit vazbu, použijte jiný účet nebo vytvořte nový účet
Nevyčerpané placené výhody v tomto účtu, nelze provázat
Přihlaste se nebo se zaregistrujte, abyste mohli spravovat své výhody
Share the rights and interests of DWG FastView on mobile phones, computers, and web pages
Your DWG FastView paid account is still valid, do you want to continue this purchase and close duplicate subscriptions?
If you have closed subscription yourself, you can proceed to purchase.

"The super membership benefits have taken effect, and your Apple premium membership benefits are included. To prevent repeated deductions, please cancel the Apple premium membership subscription by yourself.
Operation steps: Log in to the Apple device--App Store--Account--Subscribe. Find DWG FastView for subscription management.
If you do not cancel the subscription in time, repeated deductions will occur when the subscription expires, and you can only apply for a refund from Apple. In order to avoid losses, please complete the cancellation in time!"
Ak ste si zakúpili v službe App Store, nemôžete zakúpiť v službe Google Play, kým neplatí platený účet - a naopak.
Potvrďte, že automatické obnovenie aplikácie App Store bolo zrušené.
Potvrďte, že automatické obnovenie služby Google Play bolo zrušené.
Účet Google Play je nezvyčajný, skontrolujte.
Your phone number has been blacklisted! Please contact customer service.
Pokračujte v zakúpení s cieľom predĺžiť dátum vypršania platnosti tohto účtu.

"1. You can purchase and renew through Alipay/WeChat payment, and enjoy ultra-low price discounts for automatic renewal. 2. The underlined price is the original price, and the unlined price is the discounted price. 3. Automatic renewal for you before expiration. 4. Automatic renewal can be canceled at any time, and no automatic deduction will be made after cancellation. 5. Cancel WeChat automatic renewal: In WeChat, click [Me] >> [Service] >> [Wallet], click [Payment Settings] >> [Automatic Renewal], find HaochenCAD View King, and close the deduction service. 6. Cancel Alipay automatic renewal: In Alipay, click [My]>>[Settings] in the upper right corner>>[Payment Settings]>>[Password-free payment/automatic deduction], find DWG FastView to close the automatic deduction ."

"1. Purchases can be made via Alipay/WeChat Pay. 2. The underlined price is the original price, and the unlined price is the discounted price. Currently, only auto-renewal subscriptions are available for ultra-low price discounts."
Choose an auto-renewal package and enjoy preferential prices

"1. You can enjoy ultra-low price discounts in the automatic renewal mode. 2. Before the periodic service expires, you will be reminded of the payment deduction by SMS or email, and the subscription will be automatically renewed. 3. You can cancel the automatic renewal at any time, and no automatic deduction will be made after cancellation."

"1. The automatic renewal mode can be activated through Alipay/WeChat, which can enjoy ultra-low price discounts. 2. Before the periodic service expires, you will be reminded to the payment deduction by SMS or email, and the subscription will be automatically renewed. 3. You can cancel the automatic renewal at any time, and no deduction will be made after cancellation. 4. Cancel WeChat automatic renewal: In WeChat, click [Me] >> [Services] >> [Wallet], click [Payment Settings] >> [Automatic Renewal], find DWG FastView and close the deduction service. 5. Cancel Alipay automatic renewal: In Alipay, click [My]>>[Settings] in the upper right corner>>[Payment Settings]>>[Password-free payment/automatic deduction], find DWG FastView to close the automatic deduction ."
Automatic renewal upon expiration, can be canceled at any time
Iba 0,3 juanov za deň, prezerať výkresy bez reklám
Získejte výhody prémiového účtu za pouhých $0,16 na den
Used to access, browse, edit or delete drawing files stored in the device
For recording audio annotations or using the voice call function
Used to add picture annotations or set avatars

"In order to provide cloud drawing sharing services, we apply for your authorization to read the clipboard. After that, the clipboard information will be read in the minimum necessary range when the application starts.
Refused to authorize, cloud drawing sharing password will not be recognized. To enable it, please go to the in-app settings - system permission management, and open the clipboard read permission."

In order to quickly add friends and use the collaboration function, please authorize the mobile phone address book permission. We will ensure that your address book information is safe and not leaked. You can manage permissions through the system Settings.
Apply for permission to use the address book
Used to select contacts to add as project members
Used to access media and files stored on this device
Used to display notifications in the status bar
You have denied DWG FastView access to the microphone permission. Functions such as recording audio annotations and video annotations will be unavailable. Please re-authorize.

You have denied DWG FastView access to your phone storage. Important functions such as displaying files, opening drawings/photos/media files, and downloading from cloud storage will not be available. Please reauthorize.
In order for you to browse and edit drawing files on the device normally, please allow authorized access to all files. You can manage permissions through the system Settings.

In order for you to use the functions of browsing drawings, uploading avatars, inserting or sending pictures/videos, please allow authorized access to the photos, media content and files of your device. You can manage permissions through the system Settings
Mobile phones do not support purchases yet. Please copy the link and go to the computer web page to purchase.
Zmrazovanie a rozmrazovanie úložiska v cloude
Nelze nahrát soubory větší než 500 MB
You have not yet activated the automatic renewal service
Zadajte mobilné číslo alebo e-mailovú adresu
Účet nebol aktivovaný. Skontrolujte svoj e-mail a kliknite na odkaz na aktiváciu
When turned off, the number of ads you see will not decrease, but the ad relevance will be relatively reduced.
Please specify a valid length value
Measure a length and specify a ratio>
Add friends in WeChat, QQ and other apps
Added successfully, set to current ratio
Screenshot save to phone, scan with Wechat
Špatné připojení k síti, prosím, zkuste to znovu později.
Připojení k síti není k dispozici. Prosím, zkontrolujte nastavení Vaší sítě.
Vnitřní chyba programu. Prosím zkuste to znovu později.
Are you sure to exit the application?
We kindly inform you that we have updated our User Agreement and Privacy Policy in accordance with the latest legal requirements.
do not collectively collect your other personal information as a result of your consent to this Privacy Policy
will apply for authorization from you separately in the form of a pop-up window
it will not affect the use of basic functions

Information and system permissions that are not required for basic functions will be authorized separately in the specific function operations that require the use of such information. At that time, you can refuse or agree to the authorization. If you refuse, the function cannot be used, but it does not affect the operation of other functions.Specific functional operations include:
Information and system permissions that are not required for basic functions
you can refuse or agree to the authorization

" We will collect and use your information in accordance with the Privacy Policy, but will not collect personal information in a bundled manner just because you agree to this Privacy Policy.
In order to ensure the normal startup and operation of the product and provide you with basic functional services, you must authorize us to collect the necessary device information:"

" Device information specifically includes unique device identification code, login IP address, device model, device name, device identification, language setting, operating system and application version, method of accessing the network, network quality data, mobile network information (including operator name), product version number, and information about the location of the device (including the geographic location information you authorize us to obtain)."
" Do you agree to authorize us to collect the above device information?"
but will not collect personal information in a bundled manner just because you agree to this Privacy Policy
In order to ensure the normal startup and operation of the product and provide you with basic functional services
Information and system permissions that are not required for basic functions
you can refuse or agree to the authorization

"Please understand that device information is the information we must collect to ensure the normal operation and startup of the product. We will strictly follow the principles of lawful, legitimate and necessary collection.
We do not collectively collect your other personal information as a result of your consent to this Privacy Policy.For other personal information that is not required for basic functions, we will apply for authorization from you separately in the form of a pop-up window.At that time, whether you agree or refuse, it will not affect the use of basic functions.
If you do not agree to this Privacy Policy, we will not be able to start normally and provide basic functions."
do not collectively collect your other personal information as a result of your consent to this Privacy Policy
will apply for authorization from you separately in the form of a pop-up window
it will not affect the use of basic functions
Read full terms of User Agreement and Privacy Policy
"Vážíme si Vaší podpory. Děkujeme za doporučení."
Ďakujeme za hodnotenie, teraz choďte na hodnotenie
After reset, all pop-ups will be reminded once more
Registrovat pro získání zkušební verze Premium účtu zdarma
Remaining time in the company: %s minutes
Voice calls can be used in the shared chat, you are currently an enterprise account, sharing the enterprise call duration
During a voice call, tap to continue
Voice calls can be used in the shared chat, and you can get %s minutes of free voice call time per month. The remaining time of the current month cannot be accumulated to the next month.

Bluetooth devices are allowed after enabling. If you want to enable it again after being disabled, please go to [Left Menu-Settings-System Permission Management] to enable the permission to connect to nearby devices.
Support Bluetooth devices during voice calls
The model does not contain measurement-related data and does not support measurement
Are you sure you want to clear all measurement results?
Check the object to be measured
The current model has no PMI information to display
The 3D view core has been upgraded, now the file being reconverted for you.
"The 3D view function has been updated, and it can be used after upgrading to the latest version. Would you like to redirect to the app store to update?"

"There is an important update for the 3D view function, and it can be used after updating to the latest version. If you do not update, you will not be able to open drawings. Would you like to redirect to the app store to update?"
"There is an important improvement to the 3D viewing feature. Please upate to the latest version to enjoy it. Do you want to jump to the app store to update to the latest version?"
Xrefs in drawings are all loaded and up to date
The name contains unsupported characters, please re-enter
The name contains unsupported characters, please re-enter
The block name is already used by an external reference. Please re-specify the block name.
Check the result and mark it on the drawing
The function of marking measurement results is only available in the advanced drawing mode. Are you sure to switch the mode and continue?
Please enter the number of line segments
Download completed. You can immediately load downloaded Xrefs. If the prompt is turned off, DWG FastView will automatically load the downloaded external reference when opening the drawing next time
The download is complete, click Load
The following external references are being downloaded, please wait for all downloads to complete before loading them at once
The search is complete, click here to view
A block with the same name exists in the block library. Do you overwrite the block in the library or add a new block?
Please tick the blocks you want to add
The block already exists, please re-specify the block name
In this drawing the number of “%s” is %s
Would you like to redefine this block reference?
Zvolená vrstva je aktuálna, chcete ju vypnúť?
Please select at least one creator
Please select at least one annotation
The following external references failed to load, please confirm whether the external references can be opened normally in the same directory of Cloud
The following external references failed to load, please check whether the external references can be opened normally in the directory as project/%s Drawing Management
Please enter text after long press
Inserted successfully! Because the word height lock value is small, please adjust the viewport to view
The unit of the drawing is mm, and the unit of ㎡ is displayed with 2 decimal places.
Velikost vybraného textu je pevná a nelze ji měnit.
To set the dimension text size, you need to switch to edit mode. Are you sure you want to switch mode and continue?
Prepnite na meranie v jednom segmente
Do you want to clear all records?
Export successful, view it in Recent
Do you want to clear this record?
The name could not be null.
This scale could not be deleted
Drawing edited, Multiple DWG view might cause DWG FastView to abort due to insufficient mobile phone memory so the edited content will be missing. save drawing?
"Multi-dwg view supports two drawings viewed at the same time, compare and view them up and down. Go to select the second drawing?"
The server connection is abnormal, please try again
No more prompts next time, downloading automatically
Comments created within the last %s days
Annotations created during a custom date
Opravdu chcete smazat? (Po smazání nelze obnovit)
Keyword search only supports leader annotations and text annotations
Annotation resource downloading, please be patient...
Start date cannot be greater than end date
Aktuální výkres je dočasný výkres. Nelze použít funkci poznámek. Nejdřív uložte výkres v místním úložišti.
You can upload annotations to My Cloud in order to view drawings across devices and share with friends.
Anotácie boli uložené lokálne. Anotácie pridané k súborom v schránke je možné prezerať iba lokálne. Anotácie v časti „My Cloud“ si môžete prezerať na rôznych zariadeniach alebo zdieľať s priateľmi.
Používáte starou verzi aplikace a nemusí být možné upravit / zobrazit část poznámek, doporučuje se aktualizace na nejnovější verzi.
Tato poznámka byla vytvořena vyšší verzí aplikace.
Ve výběrové sadě existují objekty, které byly vytvořeny vyšší verzí aplikace
Long press icon to set as resident command, keep on the right of the quick command bar.
Remove this command from resident commands zone?
The file is being saved. To avoid data loss or file corruption, please remain on the current screen.
"Object acquisition failed. It is recommended that you go to model space to operate. How to switch to model space? Click Layout in the bottom menu, and then click Model in the list."
"The selected block is in the viewport of the layout. Only the number of blocks within the viewport range is supported. Click OK to narrow the statistical range and continue to count."

"The selected object is in model space and cannot be selected in layout. It is recommended that you go to model space to edit the object. How to switch to model space? Click Layout in the bottom menu, and then click Model in the list."

"Some of the selected objects are in model space and cannot be selected in layout. Objects that cannot be selected have been filtered. If you need to select an object in model space, it is recommended that you go to model space and select it. How to switch to model space?
Click Layout in the bottom menu, and then click Model in the list."
Click to set the selected layer as the current layer
The layer is currently closed. After setting it as the current layer, it will be reopened. Do you want to continue?
This layer is a frozen layer, cannot be set as the current layer
This layer is an external reference layer, cannot be set as the current layer
Set this layer as current layer?
The drawing unit is mm, displaying 3 digits after the decimal point
The drawing unit is mm, with m as the unit to display 3 digits after the decimal point
"1 Useful Words function 2 Click useful words to quickly add to the drawing 3 can be turned off in the settings, and will not be displayed on the screen after closing"
Please open the drawing you want to paste and execute Paste across drawings in Tools.
Aktuálny stav môže stále zobrazovať alebo zväčšiť zobrazenie
Jste si jisti, že chcete smazat tuto záložku?
Aktuální výkres je dočasný výkres a funkce záložky není k dispozici, uložte jej prosím lokálně před použitím této funkce.
There are Xrefs that can be downloaded/updated from Cloud
There are Xrefs to download/update from project/%s Drawing Management
"Externá referencia čakajúca na opravu, opravte najskôr a ukončite. Externá referencia čakajúca na opravu nasledovne:"
"Externá referencia sa nenačítala, vložte referenciu a aktuálny výkres do jedného priečinka a znova ho otvorte. Neinštalovaná externá referencia nasledovne:"

The following Xrefs are included in the drawing, unloaded Xrefs may result in incomplete content display. Click OK to continue searching/synchronizing in the directory of project/%s drawing management

"The current drawing is from project/%s. Every time the current drawing is opened, the system will try to find the [unloaded] xref drawing in the following locations in project/%s-Drawing Management, and verify whether the [loaded] xref needs to be synchronized with the latest version: (1) The storage path specified by each external reference file (2) The current drawing is in the same directory The above search and synchronization process requires a network connection, and it will be kept in the background, and will not affect your operation of the current drawing."

The current drawing comes from project/%s, you need to enter the drawing management first, find the above-mentioned external references in the same folder of the current drawing and open them once, then open the current drawing to load the external references.

No Xrefs found to download/update. The display of the current drawing content may not be complete. Please upload the external reference to the same directory as project/%s Drawing Management and then reopen the drawing
The drawing contains the following external references. Unloaded external references may cause incomplete content display. Searching/synchronizing under the project/%s drawing management directory.
The following Xrefs are included in the drawing, unloaded Xrefs may result in incomplete content display. Click OK to continue searching/synchronizing in the directory of Cloud

"The current drawing comes from Cloud storage. Each time the current drawing is opened, the system will try to find the [unloaded] xref drawings in the following locations in the cloud in turn, and verify that the [loaded] xrefs need to be synchronized with the latest version: (1) Each xref refers to the storage path specified by the file (2) The current drawing is in the same directory The above search and synchronization process requires a network connection, and it will be kept in the background, which will not affect your operation of the current drawing."
No Xrefs found to download/update. The display of the current drawing content may not be complete. Please upload the external reference to the same directory in Cloud and re-open the drawing
The following Xrefs are included in the drawing, unloaded Xrefs may result in incomplete content display. Searching/synchronizing in the directory of Cloud
There are external references in the drawing that are not loaded, which may cause the content to be displayed incompletely

"If you have drawing files in the list, you can distinguish different scenes and take corresponding operations to load external references: Scene 1:open drawings from WeChatQQfile manager and other apps: after opening all external reference files once , and then open the current drawing. Scene 2: the file is saved locally on the device: move the drawing and the external reference file in the list to the same directory, and then open it through DWG FastView."

The currently loaded external reference drawing is a locally edited version, which has not been synchronized with Cloud. You can find the drawing under My Cloud, and click the red synchronization button on the right to synchronize the drawing. It is recommended that you synchronize as soon as possible to keep versions consistent across devices.
Zadajte uhol skosenia od prvého riadku
Na prvom riadku zadajte dĺžku úkosu
Zvoľte hrany hrany, ktoré chcete rozšíriť
Export successful. Do you want to share this file?
"Importing WeChat files into CAD Viewer can avoid expiration and loss. On the homepage of CAD Viewer, in the + in the lower right corner, click Import File to select WeChat file import."
Import completed, some files failed to import
"%s files are being imported... It will take some time Please wait patiently"
How to avoid WeChat files from being lost due to expiration?
The object does not support search, please re-select
Objects that do not support lookup have been skipped
Aktuálna vrstva je vypnutá a kresliace objekty sú neviditeľné.
Used to display geographical location information on the Watermark Camera
Please enter a valid color value
Please enter a value between 1 to 255
Do you want to end the current operation and jump to the precision setting interface?
Do you want to end the current operation and jump to the scale setting?
Drag to adjust the position of the point

If you have mastered the method of accurately taking points after long-pressing the screen with your finger, you can turn off Support for adjusting point positions after measurement in the settings to simplify the measurement process.
How can I get the point accurately?

Press and hold your finger on the screen for about 1 second, and a blue cross will appear on the top. When the finger moves, the blue cross will follow and automatically capture. Take points more precisely.
Support for adjusting point positions after measurement
After closing, the measurement is completed and the point position is determined
After the measurement is completed, the position can be adjusted again
Režim rozvržení nelze přepnout do 3D vizuálního stylu
Select the number or letter to be numbered
Potvrďte přepnutí do režimu Zobrazení a vyberte zda mají být vykonané změny uloženy.

"Režim Zobrazení pro prohlížení 2D výkresů.
Režim úprav pro prohlížení, kreslení a editaci 2D výkresů.
Poznámka: pokud chcete změnit předvolený mód pro otevírání výkresů, proveďte změnu v nastaveních."
The selected object contains annotations and entities. Which of the following do you want to perform this operation:
Since the first selection is the entity objects, subsequent selections will automatically filter out the annotation objects and only select the entity object.
Since the first selection is the annotation object, subsequent selections will automatically filter out the entity objects and only select the annotation object.
Sure to close current drawing and open a new drawing?
Want to abandon the modification of current drawing and open a new drawing?
Táto kresba je šifrovaná kresba. Najskôr ho dešifrujte na počítači.
Táto kresba je šifrovaná kresba. Najskôr ho dešifrujte na počítači.
Lift your finger to cancel the recording
You have denied the permission of DWG FastView to use the microphone. To use the voice call function, please re-authorize.
The video has not finished downloading. Are you sure you want to abandon the download and return?
Recording time has reached the limit, ending automatically
Only one watermark remains, please do not delete it
The deletion cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this entry?
Do you want to save the edited content and return?
Do you want to discard the new watermark and return?
Location acquisition failed, please try again later
Watermark name is a required item
Select an existing watermark to create a new watermark
Select from Album (Under Development, Coming Soon)
Please fill in the watermark name first
Registrovat pro získání zkušební verze Premium účtu zdarma
Bol prekročený povolený počet znakov (%1$d z %2$d)
You have refused request from DWG FastView to use microphone. To send voice message, please re-approve.
You have denied DWG FastView access to the camera permission. To use functions such as shooting/scan, please re-authorize.
Add friends in mobile phone contacts to the project
Failed to send request, please try again later
Add friend to unlock powerful features of project
Failed to add, project members cannot exceed %s
You have entered the DwgChat from another device
Your current network is not good
Your version of DWG FastView is lower, please upgrade first if you want to use voice call
The current voice call has ended.
After opening, new messages received will be reminded by ringtones
Cannot delete drawing files created by others
"There is no drawing we are talking about the operator, go and open one"
The %s minutes of your monthly voice call time have been used up and you cannot use the voice call
"After switching to MyView, you will not be able to see the members' operations on the drawings in real time. Are you sure to switch?"
File modified, Do you want to save
After switching to ShareView, the drawing operations of the shared viewing members will be displayed in real time. Are you sure to switch?
Please view and manage files in the project management of Chat
"%s Voice call duration of this month has been exhausted, can't be used any longer"

"1. Project owners, enterprise administrators, and enterprise owners have the highest management authority over drawings 2. Drawings in enterprise Projects are automatically synchronized by default and cannot be modified."
During the use of the enterprise Project, all drawings and historical versions occupy the space of the enterprise cloud Storage.
Project owners, enterprise administrators, and enterprise owners have the authority to manage Projects and Project members
The number of employees in the enterprise has exceeded the limit and the operation failed.

The current number of project members in this company is limited to %s people, which has reached the upper limit. The number of enterprise members needs to be upgraded and expanded by the enterprise owner.
You have refused request from DWG FastView to use mobile contacts. To add friend in contacts, please re-approve.
You are not the project owner and cannot create folders
During the use of the Project, all drawings and historical versions will occupy your cloud storage, and you have the authority to manage Project and Project members.
You have successfully created the Project
"Without selecting a friend and just click to finish You can also experience the project feature."
"Basic account can create %s Projects upgrade to enjoy more services"
To use the functions in the project, please log in first
The current DwgChat does not exist
After deletion, the drawing will be unrecoverable, and other users will not be able to use the drawing. Are you sure to delete it?
You are not the project owner and cannot delete folders
After deletion, the drawing will be unrecoverable, and other users will not be able to use the drawing. Are you sure to delete it?
After deletion, the folder will not be recoverable, and other users will not be able to use the drawings in this folder. Are you sure to delete?
if enabled, you won`t be notified about new messages during the hours set.
Drawing does not exist or has been deleted
There is already a drawing with same name
Please upload the drawing file using the drawing
The drawing is being used in the DwgChat, please try again later
The drawing is being used in the DwgChat, please try again later
The drawings are collaborative drawings, and advanced drawing is temporarily unavailable.
You will not be able to chat while watching drawings

"1. Whoever uploaded the drawings can delete and rename the drawings. 2. Single chat does not support drawing version management, and does not support creating folders 3. If you want to use more drawing management functions, please create a project Project."
In the single chat, who uploads the drawing and occupies whose cloud space
Are you sure to delete the selected %s historical versions? They cannot be recovered after deletion.
Are you sure you want to delete the current version %s, it will not be recoverable after deletion
Are you sure to update %s to the latest version?
You do not have permission to delete drawings
You do not have download permission and cannot download drawings
You do not have permission to upload a new version and cannot roll back
The file has expired or has been cleaned up
Your account has an ongoing shared drawing chat. Do you want to end this shared drawing chat and start a new shared drawing chat?
File does not exist or has been deleted
You have refused request from DWG FastView To use the send file features, please re-approve.
Folder does not exist or has been deleted
A folder with the same name exists
The drawings in the folder are being used in the shared chat, please try again later
I`ve accepted your friend request.Now let`s chat!
and delete the chat history and drawing file with the contact at the same time
The request has been sent and is waiting for the other party to agree
You have added %s and start chatting now.
%s just added you to contact book, now you can start chatting.
Due to abnormal data, there may be differences between drawing info and actual info.
Number of people has reached limit, project cannot be created.
Up to %s Projects can be created for premium accounts
Only the Project owner can delete the drawing files in the Project
Are you sure to delete Project members %s?
Are you sure to delete %2$s Project members including Project members %1$s …?
The project where the drawing belongs to has been disbanded, the drawing cannot be used
After the Project is disbanded, drawings and other information in the Project will be completely deleted and cannot be restored.
After quitting, other members of the Project will not be notified and will no longer receive messages from this Project

The Project owner has management rights to the drawings in the Project. Only the Project owner can delete drawings, delete historical versions, create folders, rename folders, move folders, rename drawings, and move drawings.
During the use of the Project, all drawings and historical versions occupy the cloud image space of the Project owner.

The Project owner has management authority over the Project. Only the Project owner can delete members in the Project, disband the Project, transfer Project management rights, set Project member permissions, and modify the Project name.
Here you can set your name in this Project. This name will only be displayed in this Project
Drawings that have not been uploaded or have been deleted, please upload first
There is no drawing available in the project or it has been deleted, please upload it first
Shared chat drawings only support DWG, DXF, and DWS format drawings, please upload them first
The number of Projects created by this user has reached the upper limit, and the Project cannot be transferred.
The cloud storage of this user cannot save the project drawing due to insufficient space, and the project cannot be transferred.
This user has been logged out, the group cannot be transferred.
Selecting %s as new owner will release your ownership
Improve efficiency and accuracy of drawing communication
Multi-person sharing of drawings can be edited and viewed online
Assignment, review and traceability of tasks based on drawings
Information bulletin board accessible from drawings
You are currently sharing %s DwgChat. Do you want to enter the new %s DwgChat?
Please enter the correct mobile No./Email
[Link] I added you as a friend in DWG FastView, and invited you to use [project] features.
This user has not used DWG FastView

After logging in, multiple people can view a drawing together remotely, and the operations of one person on the drawing can be displayed simultaneously on the mobile phones of other participants in real time.

DWG chat allows multiple people to view a drawing remotely, and one person’s operations on the drawing can be displayed simultaneously on the terminals of other participants in real time. Only friends or Projects can use this function.
The number of people exceeds the limit, and up to %s people can DwgChat at the same time
Members who ShareView cannot open the drawing in the DwgChat
Current number of DwgChat exceeds the limit
Allow mobile contacts permission and find your friends
This person is already your friend in DWG FastView, which can be viewed in DWG FastView contacts book.
You are not the project owner and cannot move drawings
You are not the project owner and cannot move folders
Folder does not exist or has been deleted, please move to another folder

Shared DWG chat allows multiple people to view a drawing remotely, and one person’s operations on the drawing can be displayed simultaneously on the terminals of other participants in real time. You can use this feature after logging in.
You have not received the request to add friends
TA has enabled Friend Confirmation.Send a friend request to DwgChat.
After adding friends, multiple people can view a drawing together remotely, and the operations of one person on the drawing can be displayed in real time on the mobile phones of other participants.
You are no longer a member of the %s Project, you cannot use the drawings
Your DWG FastView account has been logged in on other devices or other Gstarsoft at the same time, this device will not be able to receive messages sent by friends
Your account is being used on another device. To continue using project feature, account on other devices will be offline, continue or not?
DwgChat is in progress, and it is not the drawing you want to chat. Do you want to enter?
"Your account has been logged in on other devices or other Gstarsoft's products. You have been forced to log out of the shared drawing chat."
You are currently DwgChat. Do you want to open the drawing and exit DwgChat?
You are currently DwgChat. Do you want to open the file and exit the DwgChat?
You are currently DwgChat. Do you want to open the link and exit the DwgChat?

According to the requirements of relevant national laws, the use of Internet services such as instant messaging requires the provision of real identity information. Please set your mobile number to continue using DWG FastView project function.
Add friends of DWG FastView to the project
Ordinary project members cannot exceed %s people. Please contact the person to use the enterprise project.
Ordinary project members cannot exceed %s people, please contact the person in charge to upgrade to enterprise membership and use enterprise projects.
The number of project members has reached the upper limit of %s, and can be converted into an enterprise project to add more members.
The number of project members has reached the upper limit of %s people. You can change enterprise applications and create enterprise projects in enterprise applications.
Project members cannot exceed %s, please contact the person in charge to upgrade to enterprise membership and use enterprise projects
The number of project members has reached the upper limit of %s, please contact the person in charge.
The number of project members has reached the upper limit of %s. Click View Details to upgrade the membership to expand the number of project members.
"The number of project members to be transferred exceeds the upper limit of project members in the user's rights and interests, and the project cannot be transferred."
"Multiple members can be added to the project, all members can view the project drawings, drawing annotations and changes are synchronized in real time for all members."
Multiple people can collaborate after adding project members
If you receive enterprise project messages, please check them in GstarCAD mobile version.
Ordinary members can create %s projects, please upgrade your membership.
To use the project, you need to upgrade to the latest version
You were removed from project by the project owner
You are not the project owner and cannot rename drawings
You are not the owner and cannot rename folders
Resumption of DwgChat is abnormal, please re-enter
This drawing has not been chatted, select a friend/project to start sharing the chat picture
Sending failed, there is already a drawing named “%s”
Sending failed, a drawing named “%s” already exists. If you want to update this drawing version, please go to the details of this drawing in drawing management.
Please choose to send files less than 100M
Verify when adding me as friend
After it is turned on, your consent is required to add you as a friend
After turning on, you will receive a prompt message when you log in to the same account at the same time.
After turning on, opening or closing drawing may auto sync.
After opening, new messages received will be reminded by vibration
Start with creating a project using project features
Sound will be played through the speakers
Currently offline, Cannot join the DwgChat
You are currently offline and cannot open drawings from project
Sound will be played through earpiece
"There is not enough space for your friends' cloud. If you want to modify your friends' drawings, please contact your friends to expand the space."
Insufficient cloud storage, please contact the owner to expand
Send and receive drawings, faster and more convenient
Drawings are synchronized, one person can modify and view them in real time
Shared DWG chat, one person can operate the drawings and other participants can display them simultaneously in real time
Enterprise accounts, Project unified management drawings, one-click distribution
Only the person in charge can transfer the project
%s has not added you as a friend, please send a friend verification application first, and the other party can only be invited to join the Project after passing.
The Project name is changed to %s
The message exceeds the withdrawal time and cannot be revoke
%s has enabled Friend Confirmation.Send a friend request to chat.
The voice file has not been downloaded yet
%s is using this feature, please try again later
The other party is already a member of the %s project
This user has not registered with DWG FastView, please copy the following content and send it to him.
This user has been logged out
"I created the project %s in DWG FastView, please follow the steps below to join! "
"1. Search for DWG FastView in the App market, download and install "
"2. Register and log in to DWG FastView via mobile phone number %s "
"2. Register and log in to DWG FastView via email %s "
The video has expired, and the undownloaded part cannot be played
"After the cache is cleared, the drawing needs to be re-downloaded next time. Are you sure you want to clear the selected cache files?"
Naozaj chcete vyčistiť vybraný súbor cache?
Tento soubor ještě nebyl synchronizován. Chcete jej po synchronizaci sdílet?
"Cloud storage frozen! %s You can delete some files or upgrade your account."
"Cloud storage frozen! %s You can delete some files or go to web DWG FastView and buy \"Cloud storage\". Address URL: https://web.gstarcad.com/yun/"
"The Cloud storage is frozen! %s You can choose to clean up useless files or upgrade your membership."
"The Cloud storage is frozen! %s You need to clean up useless files manually."
"Insufficient Cloud storage! You can upgrade your membership, or go to the web version of DWG FastView to purchase the Extended Cloud Storage product. Address: https://web.gstarcad.com/yun/"
"Insufficient Cloud storage! You can choose to clean up useless files, or go to the web version of DWG FastView to purchase the Extended Cloud Storage product. Address: https://web.gstarcad.com/yun/"
"Insufficient Cloud storage! You can choose to clean up useless files, or upgrade membership."
"Insufficient Cloud storage! You need to clean up useless files manually."
Adding members needs to be operated by the company owner or admin in the dashboard
Copy the URL of the dashboard
In order to get a better operating experience, it is recommended that you visit the dashboard on your PC
Please select the number of employees
Please enter the name of the company (team)
You will lose the rights and interests of the enterprise account and return to common membership
Please transfer the owner identity of the company Project before exit from company
You will lose enterprise account rights, restored to %s, %s expire date %s
Renewal/expansion needs to be operated by the company owner in the dashboard
Starting date of retention of rights
If there is no entry for canceling the subscription in Google play or Apple store, it means that the subscription has been cancelled and no automatic deduction will occur.
[WeChat]: In WeChat, click [Me]>>[Pay]>>Three dots in the upper right corner>>[Auto Deduction Service], find DWG FastView to cancel the automatic renewal.
[IOS] Enter the APP Store, find DWG FastView in Account>>Subscribe, and click to cancel the subscription.
[Alipay]: In Alipay, click [My]>>upper right corner [Settings]>>[Payment Settings]>>[Secret-free Payment/Automatic Deduction], find DWG FastView to turn off automatic deduction.

Your paid membership overlap with corporate membership in validity period. In order to protect your interests, the remaining days of your paid membership rights have been reserved and will be restored after the corporate membership expires.
If you have enabled automatic renewal when subscribing, please manually cancel the automatic renewal service through the payment channel.
Your account is a non-Chinese account and cannot be used in the Chinese client.
Add colleague %s as a friend, and the colleague relationship will continue.
%s invited %s to join the enterprise Project. The drawings in the enterprise Project belong to %s
We have received your trial application. If the information you submit meets the trial conditions, we will contact you within 3 working days
You currently have corporate membership rights and can create corporate Projects
The archive function will be online soon, so stay tuned
Up to 200 Projects can be created for company accounts
Drawings in the project belongs to company
The drawings in the project belong to the Project owner
The friendship with %s will be deleted, and the chat history and drawing files will be deleted at the same time. Colleague relations continue to be preserved.
Enterprise account expired, this Project will be unProjected in %s.
After enterprise project is disbanded, drawings and other data in the project will be archived and can be viewed through enterprise management background
"The identity of the company Project owner can only be transferred to the member of the company Please add at least one colleague into the Project, and then transfer the owner"
"Premium accounts can only create %s Projects Upgrade company accounts to enjoy more services"
"Super members can only create %s Projects Enterprise members can enjoy more services"
Inviting members needs to be done by the business owner or administrator

The person who is about to send the invitation link through the WeChat session and clicks the invitation link will immediately join the company and occupy one company member index. Please choose carefully the WeChat friends you want to invite.
No enterprise fonts? Please go to the enterprise management background to upload fonts. Share font files, and everyone can view drawings perfectly.
Business member metrics have been exhausted
Insufficient company cloud space, contact the company owner to expand
The company cloud space is insufficient, please expand it in the enterprise dashbaord
Your corporate membership has expired. If you need to renew, please enter the corporate management backend from the browser to operate
%s added you as a company member, you have obtained company account rights, you can view the details on the account information page
If you want to create more projects, please use GstarCAD Mobile.
Coupon claimed, go to view now
Your current account already contains rights of this product, no need to repeat purchase.
This product is not applicable to your current account, continue to purchase after upgrading.
Po odstránení sa miestne súbory nemohli obnoviť
A file with the same name or an illegal file exists in the target folder
Match half or full width forms
Please enter the text to be replaced
Do you want to replace all?
It is not available to replace text on locked layers
It is not available to replace text in external references
Aleady replaced. It is the end of list
Replaced successfully. It is the end of list
Priečinok už existuje. Zlúčiť sa s ním?
A file with the same name exists, please rename it and try again
The file name contains sensitive words, please adjust and try again.
The location of the moved file is the same as the current location, please reselect
The target folder is a subdirectory of the original folder
This file was deleted or does not exist in \"My Cloud\". Do you need to re-upload and share the drawing and annoatations?
Upload success! Drawing has been automatically uploaded to \"Cloud DWG Folder\".
The decompressed folder with the same name already exists. Open the folder or decompress it again?
DWG FastView is checking drawings, do you want to give up the operation of the current drawing and continue?

"If uploaded to other net disks，annotations can't be viewed.
if you want to view annotations across devices and share drawings to other people, please upload to My Cloud."
Failed to enter chared DWG chat, please try again

The functions available with the View/Save As permission are shown in the table below:
The following table lists the functions available for view/save as/upload new version permissions:
The functions available for viewing permissions are shown in the following table:
%s has moved the folder %s to the %s folder
%s has moved folder %s to drawing management
%s has moved the drawing %s to the %s folder
%s has moved drawing %s to drawing management
Pomocou príkazu Aligned môžete vytvoriť zarovnaný lineárny rozmer zadaním dvoch bodov.
Poskytuje niekoľko príkazov vrstvy, ako napríklad Layer Off, Vypnúť ďalšie vrstvy, Zapnúť všetky vrstvy Zapnuté atď.
Sdílejte anotace prostřednictvím služby My Cloud v různých formách, jako je záznam, obrázek, text a grafika
Názov výsledku merania sa používa pre anotáciu. Kliknutím ho upravíte.
Kliknutím na Upravit vyberte soubory pro dávkovou operaci, opakovaný stisknutím Upravit dojde k zrušení.
Kliknutím na název složky v cestě přejdete přímo do složky.
Kliknutím na ľavú ponuku sa prihlásite a zažijete výkonnejšie pokročilé funkcie.
Niektoré funkcie aplikácie %1$s nemusia fungovať správne bez služieb HMS Core, ktoré nie sú nainštalované vo vašom zariadení.

%1$s nemôže používať služby HMS Core. Spustite aplikáciu Optimalizátor (Správca telefónu) alebo prejdite do časti Nastavenia, udeľte všetky povolenia pre %2$s (vrátane automatického spustenia a sekundárneho spustenia) a skúste to znova.

Zdá sa, že máte v zariadení nainštalovanú neoficiálnu verziu služieb HMS Core (%1$s). Odinštalujte služby HMS Core v položke Nastavenia a vráťte sa do tejto aplikácie, aby ste si nainštalovali oficiálnu verziu.
Cannot be restored after deletion, are you sure to delete?
Drag to adjust the order of useful words
The content of useful words is not allowed to be empty
Ak chcete zadať čas, prepnite na režim hodín.
Ak chcete zadať čas, prepnite na textový režim vstupu
Store files uploaded by users and files generated by related services (PDF to CAD, etc.)
Store user project drawings, which can only be used in project drawing management, not visible in cloud storage
Soubor byl stažen a je shodný se souborem v cloudovém úložišti.
Soubor byl v místním uložišti změněn. Chcete jej synchronizovat?
Kresby aj anotácie tohto súboru sú aktualizované. Synchronizovať iba anotácie? alebo ako kresby, tak anotácie?
Soubor byl změněn v cloudovém úložišti, chcete jej synchronizovat?
Soubor byl změněn v cloudovém úložišti, chcete jej synchronizovat?
Soubory byly modifikovány samostatně v lokálním a cloudovém úložišti. Lokální soubor bude přesunut do Stažené/Složka konfliktních souborů\". Chcete ho stáhnout?
The local file and the cloud file have been modified separately. After synchronization, the local file will be uploaded to the Cloud storage as the latest version. Confirm synchronization?
The local file has not been synchronized, and uploading a new version will cause the file to be lost. Do you want to continue?
There are unsynchronized modifications to the local file. Rolling back the version will cause the file to be lost. Do you want to continue?
Po přihlášení budou všechny Vaše výkresy dostupné pro různá zařízení.

"Žádné oblíbené Pro přidání souboru mezi Oblíbené, stiskněte déle v seznamu souborů a následně klikněte na tlačítko Oblíbené, anebo může kliknout na ikonu Detaily souboru a následně na tlačítko Oblíbené."
"Bez záznamů Podporuje několik druhů souborových formátů . Vyzkoušet!"
You do not have save as permission, can’t save as drawing
"This file format is not supported yet. The file formats supported by DWG FastView are:"
Proč jste nemohli sdílet poznámky přímo?

"Zdieľať s anotáciami? Nahrajte súbor do priečinka „My Cloud“ a zdieľajte ho z priečinka „My Cloud“. Potom sa anotácie vo výkrese zdieľajú s výkresom. Vyberte možnosť Iba zdieľať výkres, potom sa anotácie vo výkrese nebudú zdieľať."
V tomto souboru jsou nějaké poznámky

"After opening, you can receive notifications of drawing changes in the project (drawing uploads, version updates, version rollbacks) and notifications of platform promotions. If you disable it, you will not be able to receive the above notifications. To enable it, please go to [Left Menu-Settings-System Permission Management] to enable the notification permission."
I have read and agreed with the Privacy Policy and User Agreement and
Users who register through one-click login and mobile phone verification code without the original login password can use mobile phone number verification.
Please agree to the terms below.
One key login/register with local number
"3D model viewing requires a network connection. Currently offline, please check the network."

"It is detected that the drawing failed to open in the program. It is recommended that you use the system browser to open the drawing. Are you sure to jump to the browser? After checking Don't remind again, next time the drawing will be opened with an external browser by default. If you want to restore, you can click Reset in No reminder popup under left menu Setting"
Model being converted, please be patient...
The model is being converted, please click to view later.
Model conversion failed and cannot be opened.
"Model conversion failed and cannot be opened. Please contact customer service for assistance."

"3D source files need to be converted before they can be viewed. The 3D model in the sharing link has not been converted. It is recommended that the sharer share it after the conversion is successful, or save the file to the Cloud and purchase a super membership before converting it."
"Transitioned to background conversion. You can click to view it later in the recent list or Cloud list."
"Transitioned to background conversion. You can click to view it later in the recent list. You can also view the conversion status in the Cloud > 3D Model directory."
"3D source files need to be converted before they can be viewed. The conversion function requires the purchase of a super membership."
"3D source files need to be converted before they can be viewed. The conversion function requires the purchase of a super membership. You currently have %s free conversions to try."

"The mobile terminal does not support conversion at the moment. Please download DWG FastView on your computer and complete the follow-up operation. Computer version download: https://yun.gstarcad.com/download/"
Conversion list empty, please select your PDF file
Operation failed, folder not exist or deleted
"The PDF contains %s pages, all of which have been converted successfully. Please view the conversion result under My Cloud > PDF to CAD."
"The PDF has a total of %s pages, of which %s pages were converted successfully, and other conversions failed. Please view the conversion result under My Cloud > PDF to CAD."

"Successfully added to the conversion list. You can click the icon in the upper right corner to view the conversion progress. The conversion is in progress, and the generated CAD file can be viewed later in the \"My Cloud > PDF to CAD\" directory."
The convert result can also be viewed by clicking the + in the lower right corner of the home page and select PDF to CAD.
During file conversion, please do not operate
"Already in convert list, please don't repeat adding"
"File is being converted, this folder can't be operated."
Add success, view conversion progress on top-right icon
The QR code has been occupied
The number of bound devices exceeds the limit, you can unbind and log in again
Scan completed and is preparing to open
Login to DWG FastView account on other devices
Please confirm that it is you that operate and ensure the source of the QR code is safe
Log in to the Windows/Web version for multi-device synchronization

After enabling the camera permission, you can upload avatars, insert image annotations, record video annotations, use the scan function, and send project images/video messages. You can manage permissions through the system Settings.
Apply for permission to use camera
To display real-time location on the watermark, please allow authorization to access location permissions. You can manage permissions through the system Settings.
You have denied DWG FastView access to location permissions. Real-time location cannot be displayed on the watermark. Please re-authorize.
Request permission to use location positioning

After enabling the microphone permission, you can insert voice annotations, video annotations, send voice messages, and use the voice call function. You can manage permissions through the system Settings.
Open Location Services to allow DWG FastView to determine your location.
The value exceeds the limit, please enter an integer within 10 digits
The integer digits of the ratio value cannot exceed 10 digits
Your modifications require regenerating graphs to take effect.
Opening speed may be affected after closing
Partial filling may not be displayed after opening
After closing, the drawing line is displayed in the original color
After it is turned on, the drawing line is displayed in black and white

If your currently effective product rights and interests do not match the description at the time of purchase, you can generate a diagnosis file and submit it to the customer service staff for troubleshooting.
Pri meraní dĺžky ignorujte súradnicu Z
After the permission is turned on, the cloud sharing password on the clipboard will be read. After it is turned off, the cloud sharing password will not be recognized.

"Ak sa vyskytne akýkoľvek problém so sieťovým pripojením, napríklad s výnimkou prihlásenia „My Cloud“, zlyhania pri získaní zoznamu súborov „My Cloud“ alebo chýb servera, môžete skúsiť obnoviť predvolenú konfiguráciu služby. Naozaj chcete obnoviť predvolenú konfiguráciu služby?"

"Stáhněte si DWG FastView zdarma a zažijte jeho rychlost! iOS: https://itunes.apple.com/app/id456933692 Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.gstarmc.android Official Website: https://www.gstarcad.net"

"1. Drawing sharing function, the recipient does not need to install CAD software, and the drawing can be opened on WeChat. 2. The receiver can only view and measure, cannot download DWG files. 3. Currently only available for sharing drawings below %s, please choose another sharing method to share larger images."
The drawing exceeds %s, please use other sharing methods

"By sharing drawings and annoations through WeChat, the recipient can open drawings directly without installing other software, and cannot download drawing files. This sharing method is only suitable for sharing drawings below %s."
This function requires jumping to a third-party application. Do you agree?
This feature requires redirecting to WeChat. Do you agree?
This feature requires redirecting to the browser. Do you agree?
This feature requires redirecting to the app store. Do you agree?
Clean up completed. Items that do not support cleanup have been skipped
Wrong password, click to try again
Decompression location: the same directory as the compressed package
"If the compressed package only contains 2D drawings such as DWG and DXF, you can select Local decompression. "
If the compressed package contains a 3D model, please select Cloud Unzip to avoid unnecessary repeated uploads and the risk of the assembly being displayed as blank.
It has been successfully added to the cloud decompression list. You can click the cloud decompression progress icon in the upper right corner to view the decompression status.
After successful decompression, you can see the decompressed file in the same directory as the compressed package.
The compressed package that performs cloud decompression will be displayed here. After cloud decompression, the decompressed file and the compressed package will be displayed in the same directory.
The file is being decompressed, please do not operate it.
Already in the decompression list, please do not repeat the operation
There is a file being decompressed and the folder is not supported for operation.
Je nám ľúto, pri vytváraní profilového obrázku sa vyskytol problém.
A file with the same name exists
Aktuálně Offline, zkontrolujte prosím Vaši síť!
